# FlowVault - Library for n8n workflows

## What is FlowVault?
Production-ready n8n workflow marketplace. Skip starting from scratch - get verified automations built by professionals.

## Key Features
- Curated n8n workflows
- Swedish API integrations (Fortnox, etc.)
- Advanced AI swarms
- Filter by platform, level, popularity
- 3 free downloads/month
- Pro plan for unlimited downloads

## Categories
- Content Creation
- Data Processing
- Integrations
- AI Automation
- Notifications
- And more...

## Pricing
- Free: 3 downloads/month
- Pro: Unlimited downloads

## Contact
Built by NordSym AB
Website: https://flowvault.se
